generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical component of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for version control"
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, Controller, GitHubRepository
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization using context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationEnabler
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring and visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storage and analysis of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAnalysis
]

instance OptimalControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting system parameters to optimize crane efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustSystemParameters
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring consistency between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelConsistencyValidation
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system parameters"
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical operational data for trends and patterns"
]

instance AdjustSystemParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane parameters for optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelConsistencyValidation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of consistency between physical and digital models"
]

instance C4VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 Model-based architectural visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Containerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for code dissemination and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization, HistoricalDataLogging, OptimalControl, ContinuousValidation
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application and transmitted via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the physical crane hardware."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model to visualize and describe its architecture through context and container diagrams, as specified in the documentation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol in a publish-subscribe topology using an MQTT Broker, with no details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standards are used for digital twin modeling in the Air Quality Management exemplar [14], with Microsoft Azure tools implementing the digital twin pipeline. Other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without commercial frameworks."
]
